steps.title: Identify the defining phrase
steps.content: The phrase “must be included in all performances” signals that Steiger Butte Drum is essential and non-negotiable to the piece.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Integral means essential and foundational — which perfectly matches the requirement that they must be included in all performances. The other three choices contradict this essentiality: analogous denotes similarity rather than necessity, tangential suggests peripheral importance, and subsequent refers only to timing. That matches choice C — C is correct.
